title: astragalus incanus
intro: Astragalus incanus, also known as the white milkvetch, is a perennial legume plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus incanus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its potential to help manage conditions such as hypertension and diabetes. Astragalus incanus can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including tea, capsules, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
